rag_rules: Place output range guarantees in component type annexes when concrete bounds are available
Use assign statements in implementation annexes for output features or auxiliary variables
Avoid placing guarantees in implementation annexes
Use valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) for declarations
generic_rules: Use concrete bounds or visible relations for assumptions and guarantees
Align helper declaration types with expression types
Avoid encoding AADL properties as AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants
Use valid AGREE syntax for assumptions, guarantees, equations, and assignments
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Use eq for equations, const for constants, assume for assumptions, and guarantee for guarantees
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not place guarantees in implementation annexes
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants
